title: Origins: The Worm
description:
It may not be big, it may not be strong, it may not be brave, it may not be-

This adds the "Worm" to the game. It has a collection of interesting abilities / quirks that are... worm-y??
body:
# 🪱 The Worm 🪱

### What the heck is this?

It's a worm. It does wormy things. It's able to burrow into dirt (phasing into it), it also has an ability that lets it escape from very drastic situations very easily, it also completely heals and feeds itself after killing something.

### Notes from the author

This is intended to be somewhat of a joke Origin, but in fact it is somewhat usable!
_(P.S. I forgot to put the Impact Level, but I think that makes it even funnier. If you're a killjoy, this is actually Impact Level 3 by all standards.)_
